identity: Human male mage, wise kind face, long silver-grey beard, long silver hair falling past the shoulders, pale blue eyes, slender build.
outfit: Deep blue floor-length robes patterned with silver stars and moons, a matching blue pointed wizard hat with silver trim. A grey wool cloak clasped at the shoulders. Cloth belt with pouches.
weapons: A tall gnarled wooden staff with a glowing blue crystal orb at the top, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Staff thrust forward, a bolt of blue arcane energy erupting from the crystal orb.
spellStyle: East-facing. Staff raised high, free hand raised as well, a swirling blue arcane circle hovering between the orb and the open palm.
blockStyle: East-facing. Staff planted vertically, free hand raised palm-outward, a translucent blue shimmering barrier forming in front.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped on one knee, staff fallen beside him, hat askew. Head bowed, silver hair falling forward.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), sage idle. Staff planted at his side, free hand stroking the beard. Kind thoughtful eyes.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Pointed wizard hat, long silver beard, starry blue robes clearly visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male mage, wise kind face, long silver-grey beard, long silver hair falling past the shoulders, pale blue eyes, slender build.

OUTFIT: Deep blue floor-length robes patterned with silver stars and moons, a matching blue pointed wizard hat with silver trim. A grey wool cloak clasped at the shoulders. Cloth belt with pouches.

WEAPONS: A tall gnarled wooden staff with a glowing blue crystal orb at the top, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male mage, wise kind face, long silver-grey beard, long silver hair falling past the shoulders, pale blue eyes, slender build.

OUTFIT: Deep blue floor-length robes patterned with silver stars and moons, a matching blue pointed wizard hat with silver trim. A grey wool cloak clasped at the shoulders. Cloth belt with pouches.

WEAPONS: A tall gnarled wooden staff with a glowing blue crystal orb at the top, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Pointed wizard hat, long silver beard, starry blue robes clearly visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
